case_title: PAUL ROBERT KOPCRAK VS. VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPCRAK, PAUL ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOPCRAK, PAUL ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAHDANI CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,154.64 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,258.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
